hero.subtitle: Tennisclub Kaiserstuhl
hero.title: BÖTZINGEN
hero.tagline: Playing tennis at the foot of the Kaiserstuhl – since 1975
about.label: About us
about.title: Welcome to TCK Bötzingen
about.text: For over 45 years, Tennisclub Kaiserstuhl Bötzingen has been the premier destination for tennis in the region. With modern facilities, dedicated coaches and a vibrant community, we offer everything a tennis enthusiast could wish for.
offer.label: Offers
offer.title: What we offer
offer.hall.title: Tennis Hall
offer.hall.desc: Two indoor courts for year-round playing pleasure in any weather.
offer.teams.title: Teams
offer.teams.desc: Active teams in all age groups – from juniors to seniors.
offer.training.title: Training
offer.training.desc: Professional coaching for beginners and advanced players of all ages.
offer.clubhouse.title: Clubhouse
offer.clubhouse.desc: Cozy clubhouse with terrace and view of the courts.
offer.booking.title: Court Booking
offer.booking.desc: Easy online booking for all courts – anytime, anywhere.
offer.fanshop.title: Fan Shop
offer.fanshop.desc: Club clothing and accessories in the official TCK fan shop.
events.label: Events
events.title: Upcoming Events
cta.title: Become a Member
cta.text: Join our tennis family and enjoy all the benefits of membership at TCK Bötzingen.
verein.history.label: History
verein.history.title: Our History
verein.board.label: Board
verein.board.title: Our Board
verein.trainers.label: Coaches
verein.trainers.title: Our Coaches
verein.trainers.text: Training for our young players has been provided for many years by Tennis-Welt Süd under the direction of Luiz Weller. Well-trained coaches with the appropriate coaching licenses from the German Tennis Federation guarantee high-quality training.
verein.teams.label: Teams
verein.teams.title: Our Teams
verein.teams.text: Every year, several teams in various age groups participate in the team championships of the Baden Tennis Association.
hall.info.label: Information
hall.info.title: The Tennis Hall
hall.info.text: TCK Bötzingen has a 2-court indoor tennis hall with carpet surface and embedded granulate. The hall can be used by both members and external players and guests. Hall season: first week of October to last week of April.
hall.prices.label: Prices
hall.prices.title: Hall Prices
hall.prices.subtitle: Lighting and heating are included in all prices. Prices valid from 1 October 2023.
hall.discount.label: Discounts
hall.discount.title: Discounts
hall.discount.summer.text: During the summer season (1 May to 30 September) you receive a 50% discount on individual lessons and subscriptions.
hall.discount.youth.text: Young people under 18 receive a 50% discount on all hall prices year-round.
hall.booking.label: Booking
hall.booking.title: Hall Booking
hall.booking.text: Court bookings are made through our online booking system. Payment by direct debit or credit account.
membership.fees.label: Fees
membership.fees.title: Membership Fees
membership.fees.subtitle: Extract from the fee schedule. The complete fee schedule can be found under Downloads.
membership.hours.label: Hours
membership.hours.title: Playing Hours
membership.hours.text: From the age of 18, a total of 12 volunteer hours must be completed for the club in the following year (until the age of 70).
membership.comparison.label: Comparison
membership.comparison.title: Membership Comparison
membership.faq.label: FAQ
membership.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
membership.downloads.label: Downloads
membership.downloads.title: Forms & Downloads
membership.downloads.text: Here you will find all important documents related to the club.
membership.service.label: Service
membership.service.title: Member Service
membership.service.text: Here you can submit various changes regarding your membership directly and easily.
contact.form.label: Contact
contact.form.title: Write to Us
contact.form.text: If you have questions, need information or would like to tell us something, we look forward to your message!
contact.form.name: Name
contact.form.privacy: I have read and agree to the privacy policy.
contact.map.label: Map
contact.map.title: How to find us
contact.access.label: Directions
contact.access.title: Directions & Parking
contact.access.text: To access our facility, the tennis hall and the clubhouse, you need an access authorisation in the form of an RFID key. Deposit: €35.
contact.info.label: Contact
contact.info.title: Contact Information
